messages.content:
可以。我先把你这段数据整理成**可直接粘贴到 Excel 的 CSV**（复制到记事本另存为 `.csv`，或直接粘贴进 Excel/表格软件即可）。我也把“分组标题行”单独作为一列标记，方便你后续做合并单元格/分组样式。

> 注意：`HyperGraphRAG*` 这一行你给的数据在“列6”为 `N/A†`，且最后一列（列7）缺失；我先留空。若你能补齐列7我再帮你更新。

```csv
分组,算法名称,列1,列2,列3,列4,列5,列6,列7
, None,54.9,32.5,26.1,42.8,47.3,6.0,34.9
, Contriever (Izacard et al., 2021),58.9,53.1,31.3,41.9,62.3,8.1,42.6
, BM25 (Robertson & Walker, 1994),59.0,49.9,28.8,51.2,63.4,5.9,43.0
, GTR (Ni et al., 2022),59.9,56.2,34.6,52.8,62.8,7.1,45.6
Large Embedding Models, GTE-Qwen2-7B (Ni et al., 2022),62.0,56.3,40.9,60.0,71.0,7.1,49.6
Large Embedding Models, GritLM-7B (Muenninghoff et al., 2024),61.3,55.8,44.8,60.6,73.3,9.8,50.9
Large Embedding Models, NV-Embed-v2 (Lee et al., 2024),61.9,55.7,45.7,61.5,75.3,9.8,51.7
Graph-based Retrieval-Augmented-Generation Methods, RAPTOR (Sarthi et al., 2024),50.7,56.2,28.9,52.1,69.5,5.0,43.7
Graph-based Retrieval-Augmented-Generation Methods, GraphRAG (Edge et al., 2024),46.9,48.1,38.5,58.6,68.6,11.2,45.3
Graph-based Retrieval-Augmented-Generation Methods, LightRAG (Guo et al., 2024),16.6,2.4,1.6,11.6,2.4,1.0,5.9
Graph-based Retrieval-Augmented-Generation Methods, HippoRAG (Jimenez Gutierrez et al., 2024),55.3,55.9,35.1,71.8,63.5,8.4,48.3
Graph-based Retrieval-Augmented-Generation Methods, HippoRAG2 (Gutiérrez et al., 2025),63.3,56.2,48.6,71.0,75.5,12.9,54.6
Graph-based Retrieval-Augmented-Generation Methods, HippoRAG2* (Gutiérrez et al., 2025),62.5,55.7,48.7,71.6,75.3,10.9,54.1
Graph-based Retrieval-Augmented-Generation Methods, LinearRAG* (Zhuang et al., 2025),54.5,26.0,31.0,54.9,59.0,10.3,39.3
Graph-based Retrieval-Augmented-Generation Methods, HyperGraphRAG* (Luo et al., 2025),53.6,26.4,41.6,61.2,73.1,N/A†,
Graph-based Retrieval-Augmented-Generation Methods, HELP(Ours),63.5,57.6,47.8,73.9,75.6,12.5,55.2
```

你希望我生成的是哪一种形式？
1) 继续用上面的 CSV（你自己粘贴/另存）  
2) 我直接给你一个**.xlsx 文件内容**（需要你告诉我：是否要“分组标题行”合并单元格、是否加粗/底色、是否保留 `N/A†` 这个脚注符号）  
3) 你把列名“列1~列7”改成真实指标名（如 EM/F1/Recall 等），我再按你论文/报告的格式排版
